name: Adroit
description: Gain [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

name: Clone
description: This card can be duplicated at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].

name: Corrupted
description: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP.

name: Glam
description: This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] once per combat.

name: Goopy
description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].

name: Imbued
description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.

name: Inky
description: This card deals [blue]1[/blue] additional damage and applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
description_raw: This card deals [blue]{Damage}[/blue] additional damage and applies [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].

name: Instinct
description: This card's attack damage is doubled.

name: Momentum
description: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]X[/blue] this combat when played.
description_raw: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat when played.
extra_card_text: Increase this card's damage by X this combat.

name: Nimble
description: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]X[/blue].
description_raw: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

name: Perfect Fit
description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], place it on the top instead.

name: Royally Approved
description: This card has [gold]Innate[/gold] and [gold]Retain[/gold].

name: Sharp
description: Increases damage on this card by [blue]X[/blue].
description_raw: Increases damage on this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

name: Slither
description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]3[/blue].

name: Slumbering Essence
description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.

name: Soul's Power
description: This card loses [gold]Exhaust[/gold].

name: Sown
description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain [energy:X].
description_raw: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.

name: Spiral
description: This card gains [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].

name: Steady
description: This card gains [gold]Retain[/gold].

name: Swift
description: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]X[/blue] cards.
description_raw: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
extra_card_text: Draw X cards the first time this is played.

name: Tezcatara's Ember
description: Costs [blue]0[/blue], deals [blue]3[/blue] additional damage, and gains [gold]Eternal[/gold].
description_raw: Costs [blue]0[/blue], deals [blue]{Damage}[/blue] additional damage, and gains [gold]Eternal[/gold].

name: Vigorous
description: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]X[/blue] additional damage.
description_raw: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
